3252900.name: Terror in the Corn
3252900.description:
DARE TO FACE THE TERRORS LURKING IN THE CORN

You wake under a pitch-black sky with no memory of how you arrived. Corn stretches endlessly in every direction, an eerie mist creeps through the stalks, and the witch’s ominous chanting carries on the wind. Something is moving out there... and it’s hunting you.

A HARVEST OF HORRORS

This isn’t just a cornfield, it’s the witch Dumitra’s domain. A rogues’ gallery of deranged minions prowl the rows, each with a presence you won’t soon forget. If you want to see daylight again, you’ll have to keep your nerve, read the signs, and outwit the things that wear grins in the dark.

ESCAPE THE CURSE

Get ready to be hunted and brutally killed by a twisted cast of cursed characters. Jack, Ted, Kris Kreaper, Dollie, and the witch Dumitra will take your life over and over, only for you to endlessly resurrect — trapped in a never-ending cycle. To escape, you'll need to unravel the mystery and break free from the eternal nightmare.

FEATURES

  • Immerse yourself in a chilling experience enhanced by stunning graphics and atmospheric sound design, featuring haunting melodies by Celldweller.

  • A relentless, unpredictable cast of monstrous villains with unforgettable personalities.

  • Built for Halloween nights: Crank the volume up and dim the nights for a wild Halloween night!

INSPIRED BY REAL FEAR

Terror in the Corn is inspired by Colorado’s premier haunted attraction at Anderson Farms in Erie, Colorado: A famous mile-long journey through the corn that leads to the accursed town of Raven's Gulch - Here reimagined as a horror game by FreakZone Games and Bit Bot Media.
3252900.supported_languages:
英语*
